snippet: Parents/carers wishing to apply for special case consideration or appeal a transport decision must make an application through their school using the following form: Transport special case consideration application form (DOCX) External Link . Government schools who receive a written application from a parent/carer must: Non-government schools must submit applications to the Student Transport Unit (STU) by emailing student.transport@education.vic.gov.au To appeal or seek special case consideration, applications must be made by the dates set out below under ‘Application closure dates and panel sitting dates’. Special case applications will be considered by the CAU in the following circumstances:
